cve:IRM.Title: CVEnumPMLocation
cve:IRM.Description: Production Metrics Location: all currently valid GENC trigraphs followed by Orbital Locations.
cve:IRM.Source: Deputy Director of National Intelligence for Intelligence Integration (DDII)

cve:Term.cve:Description: South Georgia and South Sandwich Islands
Saint Helena, Ascension, and Tristan da Cunha
